ab: Asa ka qamutis tu kusian mal’qatu madamu. Asa ka tikulas tu kusian mal’haqu musqut madamu. Maupata nanu isdadamu.
ch: A:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: Maupata qan, minlaliva in ak, pangqan ni ak udamuan.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: Muqnan ak masnava su piqau matasi malqatu sin malhaqu musqut tu haqu.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作石壓式及套頸式這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to make two traps, the stone pressure trap and the neck trap.

ab: Azuqnaip, mastan tu masihal! Na maqtuin ak qabasin udamuan taklilibus.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: Mada’vasin a quma tu ismut, ipin as munhan patilasan ta siza qaul, munhan ata qumah.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: Isauq a kaul tu?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: Antan ngalan i tangaa, usaduan as i munkunbu in patilasan.
ch: A:在鋤頭的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: Mananulua siza, ka’a tu milu’lu, manusqait a kaul.
ch: A:小心拿，不要受傷。鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: Ka’a tu kandapan inak tu ha’quh!
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: Isaq su haquh?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: Antan han nak haqu lukis haul ta.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: Mavia as maqansiapang an?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: Haiza nak iti sin pasaqal, maqansiap ak tu isaq nak haqu.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: Iskan haqu aipi, hanun zami sisilah vanlaz malhaqu iskan.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: Uka zamian ta iskanhaqu’kalala, makusia aam islalaskan madamu ki iskaan.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: Nii’ang ak maikusia islalaskan malaskan iskan, maqtu as muqnin masnava zaku?
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: Azuqnaip, taskun ata muqnin malaskan.
ch: B:好啊，我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: Na isnava’ak as muqnin matas’i iskan haquh.
ch: A:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: Bisukbisukin isuu islalaskanun, duu haizin naupa iskaan ulaskanun , kavai suu sibutbut.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: Mal’uang, masmuavin a qatu viduqviduq saa, ihaan aak dii mabutbut i islalaskan, ipin aas munhaan daiza mindangaz zaku siza i tavukul.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: Sibutbut i su iskan punipa zakuan ti, indangazuk ass sibutbut.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: Manaskal daingaz, madia haip sin damuh, lamakmuzan in iskan tu kalala.
ch: A:太高興了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: Kava ata musuqis paqusil kaupaka taisian.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
